description: AI Software Agency hooks — audit logging and session reminders

hooks.command: if [ -f "${AGENCY_HOME:-$HOME}/.agency/audit.log" ] && [ -n "$CLAUDE_TOOL_COMMAND" ]; then echo "[$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)] [hook:bash] CMD: $(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_COMMAND | head -c 200)" >> "${AGENCY_HOME:-$HOME}/.agency/audit.log"; fi
if [ -f "${AGENCY_HOME:-$HOME}/.agency/config.json" ]; then echo ''; echo '---'; echo 'AGENCY REMINDER: Run the memory-sync skill to persist your session learnings before closing.'; echo '---'; fi
